title: microlicia morrensis
intro: Microlicia morrensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "Brazilian powderbush."  It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microlicia morrensis include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Microlicia morrensis are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, creating a tea that can be used to treat various health issues.
